title: About Gather
metaDescription: Learn about Gather — Cairo's premium gifting platform bringing joy to every celebration.

props.title: About Gather
props.subtitle: We believe every moment deserves to be celebrated with intention.

props.title: Our Story
props.content:
Gather was founded with a simple belief: that gifting should be effortless, meaningful, and beautiful. We curate the finest gifts from premium local and international suppliers, arrange them with care, and deliver them same-day across Cairo.

From birthdays to corporate events, from Ramadan baskets to Eid boxes — we help you celebrate every moment with intention.

title: Contact
metaDescription: Get in touch with Gather for orders, inquiries, or support.

props.title: Contact Us
props.subtitle: We're here to help you create the perfect moment.
